description_long: This is a large, black SUV with a boxy, robust body and a high roofline, typical of American full-size sport utility vehicles. The exterior features a glossy black paint finish, chrome accents on the front grille and around the windows, and tinted windows for privacy. The vehicle has four passenger doors and a rear hatch, with prominent wheel arches and silver alloy wheels. The headlights and taillights are rectangular and integrated into the body, while the side mirrors are mounted on the front doors. The roof is equipped with rails, suggesting utility for carrying cargo or roof racks. The interior, though only partially visible, appears to have a spacious cabin with multiple rows of seating, likely accommodating up to seven passengers.
description: A large, glossy black SUV with chrome accents, tinted windows, and silver alloy wheels. It features a boxy design, roof rails, and four passenger doors.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the chrome grille, headlights, and left side doors with visible roof rails.
description_view_1: Right front side view highlighting the chrome grille, right side doors, and the SUV's overall length.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view displaying the taillights, rear hatch, and right side doors with roof rails visible.
description_view_3: Left rear side view focusing on the taillights, rear hatch, and left side doors with a clear view of the wheel design.
